features: ✨【Wide Compatibility】Vmag-S1 Vacuum Magnetic Phone Holder is designed for iPhone with MagSafe (iP-hone 12/13/14/15/16/17 Pro MAX series) and Android phones (Samsung, Google, Motorola, OnePlus). For non-MagSafe devices, simply attach the included magnetic ring to ensure a secure fit.

🚗【Dual Axis Adjustment & 360° Rotation】Featuring a dual-axis folding metal arm, Vmag Magnetic Car Phone Holder allows for 360° horizontal rotation and 210° vertical adjustment. Easily switch between portrait and landscape modes for various scenarios. When folded, it’s as compact as an AirPods case, making it portable. After 30,000 durability tests, it guarantees long-term stability.

🌟【Strong Adsorption】MSXTTLY Suction Phone Holder uses an innovative rotating lock vacuum suction design. Turn the dial clockwise for a secure attachment to any smooth surface, and counterclockwise for easy removal without residue. It remains stable on bumpy roads, sudden brakes, or turns, ensuring your phone stays firmly in place.

🧲【Super Strong Magnetic Force】 Equipped with 22 N52 grade neodymium magnets, this magnetic phone holder for car provides a powerful suction force of up to 2200gf. It holds your phone securely in extreme conditions without signal interference, ensuring stable navigation and clear calls.

✨【Versatile Use】This Magnetic Phone Holder is not just for cars; it adheres to mirrors, windows, and screens, making it perfect for driving, workouts, or cooking. For surfaces that require enhanced adhesion, use the included nano gel pad for repositioning or the circular PC pad for a more permanent installation. Upgrade your car accessories with this powerful and versatile magnetic car phone holder!
